case_title: LYNCH, JANICE MARIE VS SUAFAI, PATRICIA et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUAFAI, PATRICIA
